PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\super\\baseball-model; Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Depth 1 | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName, Length | Sort-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\super\\baseball-model; Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Depth 2 | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | Format-List)
Bash(findstr -i "baseball\\|model\\|python\\|Task Name\\|Status\\|Next Run\\|Last Run\\|Last Result\\|Run As\\|Logon Mode")

PowerShell(schtasks /query /fo LIST /v | Select-String -Pattern "Task Name|Status|Next Run|Last Run|Last Result|Run As|Logon Mode|Scheduled Task" -Context 0,0 | Where-Object { $_.Line -match "model|baseball|python" -or $_.Context.PostContext -match "model|baseball" })
PowerShell(Get-ScheduledTask | Where-Object { $_.TaskName -match "baseball|model|python" -or $_.TaskPath -match "baseball|model" } | Format-List TaskName, TaskPath, State)
